title: perymenium pringlei var. croceum
intro: Perymenium pringlei var. croceum, also known as yellow perymenium or yellow Mexican gold, is a flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Perymenium pringlei var. croceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
